{{Quote|We're the heavy hitters. When you need a command bridge leveled or a convoy of tanks wiped out, the K-wings get the call.|[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Miranda Doni]] shortly before her death at [[Doornik-319]]|<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />}}
The '''BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter''', commonly known as the '''K-wing''', was a heavy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]/[[Bomber/Legends|bomber]].

==Characteristics==
The K-wing assault starfighter was produced by [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]], the same company responsible for producing the venerable [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]]. Like many other [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighters, the K-wing was designed to excel in a specific primary role in combat while retaining the flexibility to serve secondary functions if needed.

[[File:EsegeTuketu-SWZ.png|thumb|left|270px|[[Esege Tuketu]]'s custom painted orange K-wing fighter]]
The K-wing starfighter's primary missions included precision bombing of planetary targets, slow-moving [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], and [[Space station/Legends|spaceborne installations]]. It also performed secondary missions as an escort or reconnaissance ship.

The hull design of the K-wing consisted of two primary wings attached to a fixed stabilizer. The two main [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]] located at the junction between the wings and stabilizer allowed the K-wing to achieve a sublight speed similar to the Y-wing, despite its larger size.

An additional engine mounted along the centerline on the aft dorsal section of the stabilizer allowed the fighter to accelerate rapidly in short bursts, much like the [[SubLight Acceleration Motor/Legends|SLAM]] system found on the Imperial [[Missile Boat]]. Unfortunately, the K-wing had no [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] capability, and was always deployed from a capital ship.

To fulfill its role in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], the K-wing carried an unusually large arsenal for a vessel of its size. The hull had a total of 18 hard points, five on each upper wing and four on each lower wing, to allow technicians to arm the ship with a large variety of weapons including [[Flechétte missile|flechétte]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton]] and other sublight torpedoes, [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal]] and other inertial bombs, small [[Space mine/Legends|space mines]], and [[T-33 plasma torpedo]]es.

[[File:Plasma_Torpedoes.png|thumb|left|270px|A BTL-S8 K-wing firing plasma torpedoes.]]
When attacked by enemy fighters, the K-wing could return fire with a short-range quad [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] turret with multi-stage lasers located at the fore and a medium-range twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret mounted on the top of its command module. The K-wing could also be outfitted with [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] cannons on the hardpoints for additional short-range firepower. Like most New Republic fighters, it was equipped with a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]].

Due to its large weapons loadout, the K-wing required a bombardier. The pilot and gunner sat in cockpits on either side of the command section. In case of emergency, this module was able to detach from the rest of the ship to serve as an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

==History==
[[File:Miranda_Doni_K-Wing_XWM.png|thumb|left|270px|[[Miranda Doni]] piloting her K-wing starfighter.]]
K-wings were first deployed in combat by the New Republic during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. Throughout their service years, they were generally deployed in outsize squadrons, with three flights of six bombers a piece.

Some [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defenders]] were known to have K-wings in their hangar complements as an alternative to [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]].<ref name="SBP1">{{SWMiniCite|set=Starship Battles|parent=1}}</ref>

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] deployed K-wings for defense during the [[Battle of Commenor (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Commenor]].<ref name="Fury">''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
===Source discrepancies===
While the first image of K-wings participating in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] in ''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]]'' shows and ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' describes the K-wing as mounting laser turrets for self-defense, in ''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'', it is indicated that the fighter has no built-in armament whatsoever, and instead relies entirely on its wing hardpoints to carry weaponry. ''The Black Fleet Crisis'' also lists the K-wing's third engine as being below the other two and at a slight angle to help the K-wing pull out of a dive, making its placement in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' unlikely. Other discrepancies include the arrangement of the wings and cockpit, with most visual sources using a pair of side by side cockpits, while the ''Black Fleet Trilogy'' refers to the pilot and bombardier sitting one behind the other. [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)]] addresses all of these issues, with the laser armaments and side-by-side cockpit arrangement being identified as later modifications to the vessel, and the "turbolaser" designation being a non-technical use of the term.
